messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-490 — Add an Expedite button to the Telegram approval ask: approve + force-promote paused->active + dispatch to build NOW, bypassing the coordinator's orthogonality/sequencing triage
What it solves: THE REQUEST. Today the BL-410 approval ask renders three inline buttons - Approve / Amend / Reject
(topicRouter.ts approvalRequestedButtons, callback_data approve:<id> / amend:<id> / reject:<id>,
dispatched in telegramFrontDeskBotCore.ts). A plain Approve tap ONLY flips the ticket's
human_approval …
First acceptance signal: The approval ask offers Expedite alongside Approve, Amend, and Reject
Approval context: Approving greenlights the Expedite verb contract above. FIRM (from the human, via Operator intake): a fourth Expedite button that approves + force-promotes paused->active + dispatches to build NOW, bypassing the coordinator's orthogonality/sequencing triage; its approve half reuses the SAME recordA…
BL-490 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-490" (or "reject BL-490 <reason>") to act.
